source_note: Chinese hot-topic candidates are collected from public trend pages; English wording is matched to supplied official English headlines when possible, otherwise suggested neutrally.

topics.chinese_topic: 自主创新 科技工作者大有作为
topics.official_english: Independent innovation: science and technology workers have great potential
topics.why_hot: Highlights China's push for self-reliance in technology, resonating with national pride and innovation discourse.
topics.share_angle: Explain how Chinese tech workers are driving innovation in key sectors like AI and semiconductors.

topics.chinese_topic: 台风巴威风力持续减小 最新预测
topics.why_hot: Typhoon Bavi is affecting millions, with public concern about its path and intensity.
topics.share_angle: Discuss how China's meteorological technology tracks and predicts typhoons, and safety measures.

topics.official_english: Deputy director buys 1 billion tokens to build flood control app by hand
topics.why_hot: Unusual story of a government official using personal funds and blockchain tokens to create a public service app.
topics.share_angle: Explore the intersection of blockchain, public service, and individual initiative in China.

topics.chinese_topic: 防汛防台风 各部门这样部署
topics.official_english: Flood and typhoon prevention: departments deploy measures
topics.why_hot: Government response to Typhoon Bavi, showing coordination and public safety efforts.
topics.share_angle: Detail China's multi-agency disaster response system and its effectiveness.

topics.chinese_topic: 新能源车平均车龄仅1.8年
topics.official_english: Average age of new energy vehicles only 1.8 years
topics.why_hot: Reflects rapid growth and turnover in China's NEV market, with implications for sustainability.
topics.share_angle: Analyze why NEVs are replaced so quickly and what it means for the environment and industry.

topics.chinese_topic: 小鹏X9集体趴窝 疑因高温
topics.official_english: Xpeng X9 vehicles malfunction en masse, suspected due to high temperature
topics.why_hot: High-profile EV brand facing quality concerns, sparking debate on EV reliability in extreme weather.
topics.share_angle: Discuss challenges of EV battery performance in heat and how manufacturers are addressing them.

topics.chinese_topic: 樊振东武磊将解说世界杯决赛
topics.official_english: Fan Zhendong and Wu Lei to commentate on World Cup final
topics.why_hot: Cross-sport star power: table tennis champion and football star team up for World Cup commentary.
topics.share_angle: Highlight how Chinese athletes are expanding their influence beyond their sports.

topics.chinese_topic: 北京上演绝美晚霞 颜值“爆表”
topics.official_english: Beijing treats residents to stunning sunset
topics.why_hot: Beautiful natural phenomenon shared widely on social media, offering a positive distraction.
topics.share_angle: Use as a lead-in to discuss air quality improvements in Beijing or simply share the beauty.
